title: Epic Structures: Dungeons
description: Adds dungeons of various rarities and sizes
body: --- ![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/835f96ebb79b4d1d1efc821a83aa46b84059b92b.jpeg) This mod adds and improves minecraft dungeons with ones varying in rarity and size filled with vanilla special items and mobs. All built using vanilla features only, meaning no custom blocks or entities included.  (FEEL FREE TO ADD TO ANY MODPACK)  **Recommended mods to help with lag:** - Enhanced Block Entities - ImmediatelyFast - Sodium - Entity Culling - FerriteCore - Chunky ![News](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca058c19de609a2084ff4818646d5aeafaf12112.jpeg) ✅ Plains dungeon ✅ Desert dungeon ✅ Snowy dungeon ![future](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ff1ce9a307bb9b8101cacac5facad40da04b13e.jpeg) **LIST OF MODS THAT ARE WORK IN PROGRESS:** ✅ Epic Villages ✅ Epic Witch huts ✅ Epic Dungeons ✅ Epic Igloos 🟨 Epic Jungle Temples (COMING SOON) --- ![Compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b971034067ae346a3929159bf8a1bb53ef90ffed.jpeg) ✅ EVERYTHING [![Join the Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/370b72768ac048862cb8fb192e72d2d9440864e9.jpeg)]([https://discord.gg/T4xFVm8kct](https://discord.gg/2fctpq5by9)) [![Support us on Kofi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ad411dc836beeeb4960d34dc09869d7e82d03f9_0.webp)](https://ko-fi.com/atii1)
